title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, UI
scenario: Notification toggles remain greyed out in App Settings > General when notification permission is denied during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and begin the onboarding flow.
2. When prompted to grant notification permission, tap "Deny" or "Don't Allow".
3. Complete the onboarding process and reach the Home screen.
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications.
5. Observe the state of the master notification toggle.
6. Observe the state of all individual notification toggles (e.g., Call alerts, Message alerts, etc.).
expected: The master notification toggle should be set to OFF, and all individual notification toggles should be greyed out and non-interactive, since notification permission was denied during onboarding.
